name: Tuna Burgers (a Basic Burger Recipe)
recipeIngredient: 4 Hamburger buns or soft, Kaiser rolls; split
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tuna finely.
2. Mix with water, salt, pepper, and garlic powder until combined.
3. Form into 4 patties and coat well with olive oil.
4. Grill 4 inches from a hot fire for 3 to 4 minutes per side, or until lightly browned on both sides but still pink in the center.
5. For the last 2 minutes of grilling, place the buns cut sides down on the grill to toast the interior surfaces lightly.
6. Serve the burgers on the toasted buns.
Per serving:
305 calories, 20 g carbohydrates, 12 g fat, 70 mg cholesterol, 670 mg sodium.
